requirement_topic.en: Pressure Equipment Directive — Refrigerant Circuit Classification (Italy)
requirement_topic.zh: 压力设备指令——制冷剂回路分类（意大利）
requirement_topic.zht: 壓力設備指令——制冷劑迴路分類（義大利）

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU (PED) applies to heat pump refrigerant circuits in Italy as in all EU member states. Italy has transposed PED via Legislative Decree 26/2016 (D.Lgs. 26/2016). Classification depends on fluid group (Group 1 = flammable or toxic refrigerants such as R290; Group 2 = non-flammable, non-toxic refrigerants such as R32 and R410A), maximum allowable pressure, and volume. Category I allows manufacturer self-declaration; Categories II, III, and IV require a Notified Body. In Italy, the Ministry of Labour and Social Policies (MLPS) is the market surveillance authority for PED. UNI and CEI adopt EN 378 for refrigerating system safety.
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU（PED）在意大利与欧盟其他成员国一样适用于热泵制冷剂回路。意大利已通过第26/2016号立法令（D.Lgs. 26/2016）转化PED。分类取决于流体组别（第1组=可燃或有毒制冷剂，如R290；第2组=不可燃、无毒制冷剂，如R32和R410A）、最高许用压力及容积。第I类允许制造商自我声明；第II类、第III类和第IV类须引入公告机构。在意大利，劳动和社会政策部（MLPS）是PED市场监督机构。UNI和CEI采标EN 378用于制冷系统安全。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（PED）在義大利與歐盟其他成員國一樣適用於熱泵制冷劑迴路。義大利已通過第26/2016號立法令（D.Lgs. 26/2016）轉化PED。分類取決於流體組別（第1組=可燃或有毒制冷劑，如R290；第2組=不可燃、無毒制冷劑，如R32和R410A）、最高許用壓力及容積。第I類允許製造商自我聲明；第II類、第III類和第IV類須引入公告機構。在義大利，勞動和社會政策部（MLPS）是PED市場監督機構。UNI和CEI採標EN 378用於制冷系統安全。

summary.en: TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Boilers and Pressure Vessels, administered by SAMR) and GB 150.1-150.4-2011 (Pressure vessels) govern pressure vessels in China. SELO (Special Equipment Licensing Office) registration is required for certain pressure vessels. The Chinese risk classification methodology differs from PED and D.Lgs. 26/2016; SELO registration is not recognised as equivalent to CE marking under PED.
summary.zh: TSG 21-2016（由市监总局管理的锅炉和压力容器安全技术监察规程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（压力容器）管辖中国境内的压力容器。特定压力容器须向特种设备许可机构（SELO）登记。中国风险分类方法与PED及D.Lgs. 26/2016不同；SELO登记不被认可为等同于PED下的CE标志。
summary.zht: TSG 21-2016（由市監總局管理的鍋爐和壓力容器安全技術監察規程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（壓力容器）管轄中國境內的壓力容器。特定壓力容器須向特種設備許可機構（SELO）登記。中國風險分類方法與PED及D.Lgs. 26/2016不同；SELO登記不被認可為等同於PED下的CE標誌。

gap.en: PED classification and Notified Body requirements, as transposed by Italian D.Lgs. 26/2016, differ substantially from the Chinese SELO/TSG system. Chinese pressure vessel approvals are not recognised under PED in Italy. For heat pump circuits classified as PED Category II or higher, a Notified Body must be engaged. Italian market surveillance (MLPS) enforces PED compliance on the Italian market.
gap.zh: 意大利D.Lgs. 26/2016转化的PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异。在中国取得的压力容器批准在意大利PED框架下不被认可。对于被分类为PED第II类或更高类别的热泵回路，须引入公告机构。意大利市场监督机构（MLPS）在意大利市场执行PED合规。
gap.zht: 義大利D.Lgs. 26/2016轉化的PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異。在中國取得的壓力容器批准在義大利PED框架下不被認可。對於被分類為PED第II類或更高類別的熱泵迴路，須引入公告機構。義大利市場監督機構（MLPS）在義大利市場執行PED合規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (PED as transposed by D.Lgs. 26/2016 applies to refrigerant circuits meeting pressure/volume thresholds in Italy)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (TSG 21/SELO registration for applicable pressure vessels)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — PED (D.Lgs. 26/2016 in Italy) classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from Chinese SELO/TSG system; existing Chinese pressure vessel approvals not recognised under PED in Italy.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——PED（意大利D.Lgs. 26/2016）分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异；现有中国压力容器批准在意大利PED框架下不被认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——PED（義大利D.Lgs. 26/2016）分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異；現有中國壓力容器批准在義大利PED框架下不被認可。

requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Circuit Safety — EN 378 / UNI EN 378 System Safety Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂回路安全——EN 378 / UNI EN 378系统安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑迴路安全——EN 378 / UNI EN 378系統安全要求

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU (transposed in Italy by D.Lgs. 26/2016) is the mandatory legal framework for refrigerant circuits meeting its pressure, volume, and fluid-group thresholds. UNI EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020, UNI EN 378-2, UNI EN 378-3, and UNI EN 378-4 are voluntary harmonised standards for refrigerating systems and heat pumps adopted in Italy by UNI; applying them can support a presumption of conformity with relevant EU essential requirements. Italy also requires compliance with acoustic limits for outdoor heat pump units under D.Lgs. 42/2017 (environmental noise) and local municipal rules, which may affect installation siting.
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU（在意大利由D.Lgs. 26/2016转化）是适用于达到其压力、容积和流体组别阈值的制冷剂回路的强制性法律框架。UNI EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020、UNI EN 378-2、UNI EN 378-3和UNI EN 378-4是UNI在意大利采标的制冷系统和热泵自愿协调标准；采用这些标准可支持对相关欧盟基本要求的符合性推定。意大利还要求室外热泵机组遵守D.Lgs. 42/2017（环境噪声）及地方市政规定中的噪声限值，这可能影响安装位置。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（在義大利由D.Lgs. 26/2016轉化）是適用於達到其壓力、容積和流體組別閾值的制冷劑迴路的強制性法律框架。UNI EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020、UNI EN 378-2、UNI EN 378-3和UNI EN 378-4是UNI在義大利採標的制冷系統和熱泵自願協調標準；採用這些標準可支持對相關歐盟基本要求的符合性推定。義大利還要求室外熱泵機組遵守D.Lgs. 42/2017（環境噪聲）及地方市政規定中的噪聲限值，這可能影響安裝位置。

summary.en: GB 9237-2008 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems) is China's national adoption of ISO 5149:1993. Charge limits for flammable refrigerants in indoor environments, room ventilation thresholds, and system documentation requirements differ from UNI EN 378. China has no national equivalent to Italy's acoustic noise limits for outdoor heat pump installations.
summary.zh: GB 9237-2008（制冷系统安全要求）是中国对ISO 5149:1993的国家采标。室内可燃制冷剂充注量限制、房间通风阈值和系统文件要求与UNI EN 378不同。中国没有与意大利室外热泵安装噪声限值对应的国家等效制度。
summary.zht: GB 9237-2008（制冷系統安全要求）是中國對ISO 5149:1993的國家採標。室內可燃制冷劑充注量限制、房間通風閾值和系統文件要求與UNI EN 378不同。中國沒有與義大利室外熱泵安裝噪聲限值對應的國家等效制度。

gap.en: EU legal compliance must be assessed against PED (D.Lgs. 26/2016 in Italy) where the refrigerant circuit falls within PED scope. UNI EN 378 documentation, leak detection, and flammable refrigerant charge-limit methods differ from GB 9237. Additionally, outdoor heat pump units placed on the Italian market must meet acoustic noise limits under D.Lgs. 42/2017 and municipal zoning rules, which have no direct Chinese equivalent.
gap.zh: 若制冷剂回路落入PED范围，欧盟法律合规性必须按PED（意大利为D.Lgs. 26/2016）评估。UNI EN 378的文件、泄漏检测和可燃制冷剂充注量限制方法与GB 9237不同。此外，在意大利市场销售的室外热泵机组须满足D.Lgs. 42/2017及市政分区规定中的噪声限值，这些在中国没有直接等效要求。
gap.zht: 若制冷劑迴路落入PED範圍，歐盟法律合規性必須按PED（義大利為D.Lgs. 26/2016）評估。UNI EN 378的文件、洩漏檢測和可燃制冷劑充注量限制方法與GB 9237不同。此外，在義大利市場銷售的室外熱泵機組須滿足D.Lgs. 42/2017及市政分區規定中的噪聲限值，這些在中國沒有直接等效要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: PED (D.Lgs. 26/2016) applies where pressure/volume/fluid-group thresholds are met; UNI EN 378 is voluntary; acoustic limits under D.Lgs. 42/2017 are mandatory for outdoor units

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — PED (D.Lgs. 26/2016) applicability must be classified first; UNI EN 378 is voluntary and differs from GB 9237; Italian acoustic noise limits for outdoor units under D.Lgs. 42/2017 are an additional Italy-specific obligation with no Chinese equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——须先判定PED（D.Lgs. 26/2016）适用性；UNI EN 378为自愿标准，与GB 9237不同；D.Lgs. 42/2017下室外机组的意大利噪声限值是额外的意大利特定义务，中国无等效要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——須先判定PED（D.Lgs. 26/2016）適用性；UNI EN 378為自願標準，與GB 9237不同；D.Lgs. 42/2017下室外機組的義大利噪聲限值是額外的義大利特定義務，中國無等效要求。
